summary: The diff implements a comprehensive aesthetic redesign covering REQ-70 through REQ-74. The navigation header (Layout.tsx) has been redesigned with navy blue background, MI logo badge, MANISH INFRATECH branding, styled nav links, and red logout button. The white+blue+red theme is applied across all pages. Dark text is used throughout the content areas. Green success messages are referenced in the file summaries. Line item column headers and placeholders are updated. However, several specific acceptance criteria cannot be fully verified due to diff truncation, and a few items appear potentially incomplete.

missing_requirements.requirement: Secondary/outline buttons must use a white background with navy blue border and text
missing_requirements.reason: The diff is truncated for AddBillForm.tsx and EditBillModal.tsx, so secondary/outline button styling cannot be confirmed. No explicit evidence of secondary button styling was found in the visible portions.

missing_requirements.requirement: The printed invoice (InvoicePrintView) must display column headers: Sr. No., HSN Code, Product Name, Qty, Unit, Rate (Rs), Amount (Rs)
missing_requirements.reason: InvoicePrintView.tsx is not included in the modified files list in the diff. The file summary mentions it has these columns but no direct diff evidence confirms the exact labels were added or verified in this change set.

hallucinated_features.description: Page heading h1 elements use navy blue color (#1e3a8a) instead of black/dark gray as required by REQ-72
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-72 requires all page headings to be black/dark (#1a1a1a or equivalent), but all page files use color: '#1e3a8a' (navy blue) for h1 headings, which does not satisfy the requirement for black or very dark gray heading text.
